## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/check_repo.py`
- [ ] Python files compile
- [ ] Live ESP32/BLE verification performed when runtime code changed
- [ ] SmartThings package/log verification performed when Edge code changed
- [ ] Documentation and version history updated
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, hub/device IDs, logs, or private settings included

## Compatibility and migration

Describe any required upgrade, recommissioning, or rollback steps.
